# bookmarks

Bookmark (책갈피) collection.

# bookmarks.BookmarkCollection { #hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.BookmarkCollection }

```python
collections.bookmarks.BookmarkCollection(app)
```

``doc.bookmarks`` — collection of HWP bookmarks (책갈피).

Enumerates the document's ``HeadCtrl`` → ``Next`` chain, yielding a
:class:`Bookmark` for each control whose ``CtrlID`` is ``"bokm"``.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [add](#hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.BookmarkCollection.add) | Insert a bookmark at the current cursor position. |

### add { #hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.BookmarkCollection.add }

```python
collections.bookmarks.BookmarkCollection.add(name)
```

Insert a bookmark at the current cursor position.

# bookmarks.Bookmark { #hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.Bookmark }

```python
collections.bookmarks.Bookmark(app, name)
```

Value object for a single HWP bookmark.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [goto](#hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.goto) | Move the cursor to this bookmark. Returns success. |
| [remove](#hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.remove) | Delete this bookmark. Returns success. |

### goto { #hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.goto }

```python
collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.goto()
```

Move the cursor to this bookmark. Returns success.

### remove { #hwpapi.collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.remove }

```python
collections.bookmarks.Bookmark.remove()
```

Delete this bookmark. Returns success.
